title: User
description: Canonical user entity per identity-spine doctrine. Single sub (user_id) bound to multiple wallets, multiple credentials, multiple tenant memberships. Profile DATA stays in midi (per CLAUDE.md schemas-here-data-in-midi rule); this is the SCHEMA only.

sub.description: Canonical user_id (e.g., midi_profiles.id for mibera tenant). Tenant-scoped. JWT `sub` claim sources here.

wallets.description: User's bound wallets across chains. References score-mibera's Wallet entity by chain+address. Empty for anon users.

tenant_memberships.description: Tenant slugs the user belongs to. Multi-tenant users (e.g., bonded to mibera + cubquest) get multiple entries.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the user was first created in any tenant's midi DB.
